body:
#sponsoredbyninja Snap it. Crisp it. Serve it. Store it. That’s right, it’s that easy with the new @ninjakitchen Crispi. With this little bad boy I’ll be cooking, storing and reheating in the same dish. This will cut my cleaning time in half. Best of all when I reheat my food, I’ll be able to enjoy the crispiness even on the next day. With the help of the Ninja Crispi I was able to recreate my Mango Habanero Wings into a meal prep dish. Half the mess and no oil needed. Clean kitchen and clean eating. Check out the Ninja Crispi by clicking on the link in my bio. 

Recipe:
1.5lbs - Chicken Wings
1 tbsp - Garlic Salt
2 cups - Brussels Sprouts
2 cups - Pearl Potatoes
2 cups - Baby Carrots
1 tbsp - Garlic Salt

Step 1: In the large 4qt glass container add the raw chicken wings and season with garlic salt. Cover with the Ninja Crispi and set on Air Fry mode. Set timer for 40min. After 20min flip wings and continue to air fry for the remaining time. Once done remove wings.

Step 2: In the same glass container add the veggies, season with garlic salt and mix with tongs. Cover with Ninja Crispi Air Fryer and set timer for 25min on Air Fryer mode. After 15min uncover and mix veggies. Continue to air fry for the remaining time. Serve and enjoy with a habanero sauce of your choice. Store away reaming food in the small 6cup glass container and enjoy for another day. #ninjacrispi
